title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Invariant Lens: Composite Design
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa composite design increment in a defended multi-structure dispatch system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine structures while documenting duplicated state and synchronization invariants.
Translate operation frequency, scale, latency, memory, and consistency needs into structure criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
